---
name: Spec change
about: Propose a change to the protocol or schema
title: "[Spec]"
labels: spec
---

## Problem

What is unclear, inconsistent, or missing in the current spec?

## Proposed change

Describe the desired update as precisely as possible.

## Impact

Which SDKs, schemas, or docs need to change?

## Compatibility

Would existing payloads or verifiers need a migration path?
